path_policy: All recorded filesystem paths are repository-relative.

mps_gaf_modelnet_source2_crop_converged_.protocol: ModelNet40 source-2/crop, 20 validation batches, no max_train_steps, early stopping enabled
Automatically evaluates the best MPS-GAF checkpoint after the convergence run exits, using ModelNet40 source-2/crop and 20 validation batches

predator_official_data_download.protocol: Official PREDATOR data package for standard 3DMatch/3DLoMatch metadata

auto_launch_predator_standard_runs.protocol: Uses official GeoTransformer 3DMatch/3DLoMatch metadata with PREDATOR point clouds and launches mac,sc2_pcr,kiss_matcher

mac_sc2_modelnet_source2_crop_eval20_g4_.protocol: ModelNet40 source-2/crop, 20 evaluation batches, groups_per_batch=4, 160 pairs

kiss_modelnet_source2_crop_eval20_g4_202.protocol: ModelNet40 source-2/crop, 20 evaluation batches, groups_per_batch=4, 160 pairs

mac.source: 3D Registration with Maximal Cliques, CVPR 2023 / TPAMI extension
mac.implementation: FPFH nearest-neighbor correspondences plus greedy maximal-clique spatial compatibility filtering
mac.reporting_caveat: Same-input project implementation, not official learned-descriptor MAC

sc2_pcr.implementation: FPFH nearest-neighbor correspondences plus second-order spatial compatibility scoring
sc2_pcr.reporting_caveat: Same-input project implementation, not official descriptor pipeline

kiss_matcher.implementation: Official PyPI package wrapped as an optional robust global registration baseline
kiss_matcher.reporting_caveat: Uses the project point-cloud inputs and source-2/crop protocol, not KISS-Matcher's official LiDAR benchmark setup

3dmatch.protocol: Official GeoTransformer 3DMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds, 1623 pairs

3dlomatch.protocol: Official GeoTransformer 3DLoMatch metadata with PREDATOR indoor point clouds, 1781 pairs

standard_dataset_protocols.3dmatch: Use official/PREDATOR/GeoTransformer metadata; do not introduce a custom split.
standard_dataset_protocols.3dlomatch: Use official low-overlap metadata from the 3DMatch benchmark family; do not introduce a custom split.
standard_dataset_protocols.eth: Use the four-scene ETH laser benchmark gt.log pairs as a generalization test.
standard_dataset_protocols.kitti: Use GeoTransformer-style odometry metadata if point clouds are staged; common split is sequences 00-05 train, 06-07 validation, 08-10 test.

constraints: No nvcc on the current server, so CUDA-extension methods remain dependency-gated.
Full learned convergence requires early-stop/plateau evidence or completed epoch budget plus final eval.
PREDATOR data download was switched to resumable multi-connection aria2c and should resume from the partial archive if interrupted.
The downloaded PREDATOR data package did not include 3DMatch.pkl or 3DLoMatch.pkl, so the auto-launcher now fetches the official GeoTransformer metadata instead of generating a custom split.
Overly complex methods or datasets are allowed to remain as empty records instead of blocking the current benchmark.

mps_gaf_modelnet_source2_crop_converged_.note: Not converged; do not run final eval or claim convergence until early stop/plateau evidence or completed budget.
Watcher is active and will run final eval only after the training process exits.

predator_standard_3dmatch_mac_sc2_kiss.note: Full 1623-pair CPU evaluation completed and was synced into server_artifacts.

predator_standard_3dlomatch_mac_sc2_kiss.note: Full 1781-pair CPU evaluation completed and was synced into server_artifacts.

cast.reason: Requires a heavier CUDA-extension/dependency stack than the current server provides; skipped per simplified benchmark scope.

cofinet.reason: Requires separate official environment/checkpoint staging; skipped unless the environment is already available.

regtr.reason: Requires separate official environment/checkpoint staging; skipped unless the environment is already available.

pointdsc.reason: CUDA-extension dependency risk is high on a server without nvcc; skipped per simplified benchmark scope.

buffer_x.reason: ICCV 2025 zero-shot method, but full evaluation requires CUDA extensions plus large official preprocessed data beyond the current disk budget.

integer.reason: NeurIPS 2024 unsupervised outdoor method; official repository still requires separate cleaned environment/checkpoint staging and targets KITTI/nuScenes rather than the current ModelNet source-2/crop schema.

official_mac_descriptor_pipeline.reason: Current completed row is MAC-FPFH in the project schema; official descriptor pipeline is not required for the current comparison.

official_sc2_pcr_pipeline.reason: Current completed row is SC2-PCR-FPFH in the project schema; official reproduction is not required for the current comparison.

kitti.reason: KITTI point clouds are not staged and disk budget is limited; skip until a dedicated data volume is available.

eth_cpd_full_budget.reason: The capped ETH CPD attempt was already too slow, so the full-budget CPD run is skipped.
